div.h1: Input Section to Output Section Mapping
div.h3: Intel-Grade Technical Specification: Section Merging & Alignment
div.p: This diagram illustrates how a Linker (LD) aggregates sections from multiple input files into a unified segment layout, applying padding to satisfy CPU alignment requirements.

ol.li: Grouping: Collect all input sections with identical names (e.g., all .text).
Ordering: Arrange by file order as specified in linker script or command line.
Padding: Insert null bytes if pos > current_pos.
Relocation: Record the new Output Offset for symbol resolution.

p.em: Note: .text and .rodata are merged into the Read-Only Segment.
Note: .data and .bss are merged into the Read-Write Segment.
